userMessage: I ahev atatched the datasheet I want to do the follwoign group each test 1. Set up UART decode on B1 source CH1 115200 baud 8N1, trigger on start bit, single sequence 2. Set up I2C decode on B1 clock CH1 data CH2, trigger on address 0x48 write 3. Measure SYSOSC frequency on CH1, add frequency jitter and period measurements 4. Power rail test: CH1 VDD 3.3V, CH2 VREF, measure noise floor on both rails 5. Capture SPI transaction: clock CH1, MOSI CH2, CS CH3 active low use your best judgeemnt on scpi usage.

warnings: Detected over-concatenated SCPI command strings; split into grouped steps (max 3 per step).
